phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso del Duomo, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH ling-GRES-so del DOO-oh-moh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh COS-tah eel bee-LYET-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora apre oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh, ah kay OR-ah AH-preh OH-jee, pehr fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: Opens at nine in the morning.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how long the bus takes from Palermo to Monreale
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quanto tempo ci vuole in autobus da Palermo a Monreale?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAN-toh TEM-poh chee VWOH-leh een ow-toh-BOOS dah pah-LER-moh ah mon-reh-AH-leh?

responses.english: About thirty minutes, with the 389 from the central station.
responses.phonetic: CHEER-kah TREN-tah mee-NOO-tee, kon eel treh-ot-toh-NOH-veh DAL-lah stah-TSYOH-neh chen-TRAH-leh.
responses.french: Circa trenta minuti, con il 389 dalla stazione Centrale.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what the mosaics inside show
phrases.text_local: Scusi, cosa raffigurano i mosaici del Duomo di Monreale?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-zah raf-fee-goo-RAH-noh ee moh-ZAH-ee-chee del DWOH-moh dee mon-reh-AH-leh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Monreale Cathedral contains one of the world's largest and finest collections of Byzantine mosaics, depicting the Old and New Testament.

responses.english: Old and New Testament scenes, in gold and glass.
responses.phonetic: SHEH-neh del-LAN-tee-koh eh NWOH-voh tes-tah-MEN-toh, een OH-roh eh VEH-troh.
responses.french: Scene dell'Antico e Nuovo Testamento, in oro e vetro.
